message:
fix(wasm): add native_registry stubs for wasm32 linker

The frozen_module.zig declares extern functions for native_registry_*
which need to be provided. For native, these come from native_shapes.zig.
For wasm32, we provide no-op stubs via @export.

This fixes the "unlinked import function" error in WASM when running
via wasmtime. Note: AOT via WAMR still has issues - needs investigation.
